title: Notes (conversations) not moving with Item
excerpt: We are moving items from 1 board to another but the existing notes (conversation- update) are not moving with the items. can/how do I set up our board to retain this information?

posts.author: Willie (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: We are moving items from 1 board to another but the existing notes (conversation- update) are not moving with the items. can/how do I set up our board to retain this information?

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you moving the item or creating a new item?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Willie ,
you can move one item from one board to another by right click on the item and select move .By doing this you can also have the existing note in moved item.

Hope its helpful to you,
